allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in data.get\('items', []\)[:20]: print\(f\\"Stars: {r['stargazers_count']} | {r['full_name']} | {r['html_url']}\\"\) print\(f\\" Desc: {r.get\('description','N/A'\)}\\"\) print\(f\\" Updated: {r['updated_at']} | Lang: {r.get\('language','N/A'\)}\\"\) print\(\) ")
Bash(sqlite3 eval.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_rows FROM eval_log")
Bash(sqlite3 eval.db "SELECT DISTINCT run_label, agent, direction, confidence FROM eval_log ORDER BY run_label")

Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect\('eval.db'\); print\(conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM eval_log'\).fetchone\(\)\); [print\(r\) for r in conn.execute\('SELECT DISTINCT run_label, agent, direction, confidence FROM eval_log ORDER BY run_label'\).fetchall\(\)]")
